From Wikipedia, the free encyclopedia

English dialect spoken in the Maldives

| Maldivian English | |
| --- | --- |
| Native to | [Maldives](/wiki/Maldives "Maldives") |
| Region | [South Asia](/wiki/South_Asia "South Asia") |
| [Language family](/wiki/Language_family "Language family") | [Indo-European](/wiki/Indo-European_languages "Indo-European languages")  * [Germanic](/wiki/Germanic_languages "Germanic languages")   + [West Germanic](/wiki/West_Germanic_languages "West Germanic languages")     - [Ingvaeonic](/wiki/Ingvaeonic_languages "Ingvaeonic languages")       * [Anglo-Frisian](/wiki/Anglo-Frisian_languages "Anglo-Frisian languages")         + [Anglic](/wiki/Anglic_languages "Anglic languages")           - [English](/wiki/English_language "English language")             * [Asian English](/wiki/Asian_English "Asian English")               + [South Asian English](/wiki/South_Asian_English "South Asian English")                 - **Maldivian English** |
| Early forms | [Proto-Indo-European](/wiki/Proto-Indo-European_language "Proto-Indo-European language")  * [Proto-Germanic](/wiki/Proto-Germanic_language "Proto-Germanic language")   + [Proto-English](/wiki/Proto-English "Proto-English")     - [Old English](/wiki/Old_English "Old English")       * [Middle English](/wiki/Middle_English "Middle English")         + [Early Modern English](/wiki/Early_Modern_English "Early Modern English")           - [Modern English](/wiki/Modern_English "Modern English") |
| [Writing system](/wiki/Writing_system "Writing system") | [Latin](/wiki/Latin_script "Latin script") |
| Language codes | |
| [ISO 639-3](/wiki/ISO_639-3 "ISO 639-3") | – |
| [IETF](/wiki/IETF_language_tag "IETF language tag") | `en-MV` |

**Maldivian English** is an [English](/wiki/English_language "English language") [dialect](/wiki/Dialect "Dialect") spoken in the [Maldives](/wiki/Maldives "Maldives"), where it is predominantly used as a second language.[[1]](#cite_note-1)

* [Commonwealth English](/wiki/English_in_the_Commonwealth_of_Nations "English in the Commonwealth of Nations")
